creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text: The proposed changes can be viewed here: https://github.com/yaneurabeya/freebsd/pull/10 / https://github.com/yaneurabeya/freebsd/pull/10.diff . The byacc snapshot code should be updated to the latest snapshot/disabled wherever necessary to obtain a green run as some of the testcases cause yacc to core [on the version we're using], and a number of the testcases fail in unexpected ways according to the test output.
